_comment: Maps each Telegram custom_emoji_id (string) to a symbolic name used by server/bot/emoji.ts. Populated from a personal Unigram custom-emoji export (@SOUICdsgn, 119 IDs). Loaded via getCustomEmojiStickers at startup — no bot-owned sticker set required. Unknown/invalid IDs are silently skipped. Symbols referenced by the bot: info, diamond, music, stats, package, broadcast, gear, check, profile, wallet, plus, ruler, sparkle, gift, cross, warning, prohibited, headphone, crown, key, link, success_on, success_off, star, trash, back, search, bell.
